name: Beer Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Oil and flour a 9x5 inch loaf pan. Set aside.
3. In a medium mixing bowl, combine all-purpose flour, whole-grain wheat flour, sugar, baking powder, onion flakes, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (beer, eggs, and oil) to the dry mixture. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed for about 1 minute, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the pan immediately and cool on a wire rack.
Makes 1 loaf of bread.
